title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself does not pose a direct threat but could be exploited by malicious actors to identify and target unpatched vulnerabilities in systems. Additionally, improper use or reliance on the tool without thorough validation may lead to a false sense of security.
recommended_actions: Evaluate the tool in a controlled environment before deploying it in production to ensure it aligns with organizational security policies.
Educate teams on the limitations of automated vulnerability scanners and emphasize the importance of manual validation of results.
Monitor the tool's development and community discussions for any reports of misuse or security flaws in the tool itself.

title: A flaw has been found in itsourcecode Hospital Management System 1.0. This affects an unknown...
description: A flaw has been found in itsourcecode Hospital Management System 1.0. This affects an unknown function of the file /patient.php. This manipulation of the argument editid causes sql injection. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit has been published and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-14638.

title: A vulnerability has been found in CodeAstro Ecommerce Website 1.0. This impacts an unknown...
description: A vulnerability has been found in CodeAstro Ecommerce Website 1.0. This impacts an unknown function of the file /ecommerce-website-php/customer/my_account.php?edit_account. Such manipulation of the argument c_name leads to sql injection. The attack may be launched remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to perform SQL injection via the 'c_name' parameter in the 'my_account.php' file. This could lead to unauthorized access to sensitive customer data, database tampering, or potential data breaches.
affected_industries: Small and Medium Businesses (SMBs) using CodeAstro Ecommerce Website 1.0
recommended_actions: Immediately sanitize and validate all user inputs, particularly the 'c_name' parameter, to prevent SQL injection.
Apply a web application firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious SQL queries targeting the application.
Monitor the vendor's website or GitHub repository for patches or updates addressing CVE-2026-14639 and apply them promptly.

title: Dancer2::Plugin::Auth::OAuth::Provider versions before 0.23 for Perl do not support the OAuth 2.0...
description:
Dancer2::Plugin::Auth::OAuth::Provider versions before 0.23 for Perl do not support the OAuth 2.0 state parameter.

The authentication_url method builds the provider authorization redirect without issuing a state value, and the callback method exchanges the callback code and registers the resulting token into the session without verifying that the callback corresponds to an authorization request this session initiated.

Any application that uses this plugin for OAuth 2.0 login is exposed to logi

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Dancer2::Plugin::Auth::OAuth::Provider versions before 0.23 allows attackers to exploit the lack of the OAuth 2.0 state parameter, potentially leading to CSRF attacks or session hijacking. This could allow unauthorized access to user accounts or sensitive data in applications relying on this plugin for authentication.
recommended_actions: Immediately update Dancer2::Plugin::Auth::OAuth::Provider to version 0.23 or later to ensure the OAuth 2.0 state parameter is supported and properly implemented.
Review and test all OAuth 2.0 authentication flows in affected applications to ensure proper state parameter handling and session validation.
Monitor application logs for unusual authentication behavior and consider implementing additional security measures, such as rate limiting or IP whitelisting, to mitigate potential exploitation.

description:
Plack::Middleware::OAuth versions through 0.10 for Perl do not support the OAuth 2.0 state parameter.

RequestTokenV2 builds the provider authorization redirect without issuing a state value, and AccessTokenV2 exchanges the callback code and registers the resulting token into the session (register_session) without verifying that the callback corresponds to an authorization request this session initiated.

Any application that uses this middleware for OAuth 2.0 login is exposed to login cross-sit

This vulnerability affects the function checkForPostRequests of the file application/core/MY_Controller.php of the component Subscribed Emails Admin Page. Such manipulation of the argument User-Agent leads to cross site scripting. The attack may be performed from remote. The exploit is publicly available and might be used. This product utilizes a rolling release system fo

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows for cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks via the User-Agent header on the Subscribed Emails Admin Page. This could enable attackers to execute malicious scripts in the context of an admin session, potentially leading to data theft, session hijacking, or unauthorized actions.
affected_industries: small and medium enterprises using the affected platform
recommended_actions: Update to the latest version of kirilkirkov Ecommerce-CodeIgniter-Bootstrap, if a patch is available.
Implement input sanitization and validation for the User-Agent header to prevent malicious scripts from being executed.
Monitor application logs for unusual User-Agent strings and consider deploying a web application firewall (WAF) to block suspicious requests.

title: A vulnerability was detected in NousResearch hermes-agent up to 2026.5.16. This impacts the...
description: A vulnerability was detected in NousResearch hermes-agent up to 2026.5.16. This impacts the function extract_media of the file gateway/platforms/base.py of the component Live Webhook Endpoint. Performing a manipulation results in path traversal. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit is now public and may be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the hermes-agent allows for path traversal attacks via the Live Webhook Endpoint, potentially enabling attackers to access sensitive files or execute unauthorized actions on the server. The exploit is public, increasing the likelihood of widespread abuse.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply input validation and sanitization to the extract_media function to prevent path traversal.
Deploy a web application firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious requests targeting the Live Webhook Endpoint.
Monitor systems for unusual activity and review logs for signs of exploitation, particularly on endpoints running hermes-agent.

description: A flaw has been found in RT-Thread up to 5.2.2. Affected is the function read/write/sys_ioctl of the file components/lwp/lwp_syscall.c of the component Parameter Handler. Executing a manipulation can lead to divide by zero. The attack may be launched remotely. The exploit has been published and may be used. The pull request to fix this issue awaits acceptance.

While the exploit is of high complexity and difficult to execute, it could allow unauthorized access to systems relying on this integration, potentially exposing sensitive data or enabling unauthorized actions.

Review and monitor access logs for any suspicious activity related to Discord Platform Integration.
Implement additional authentication layers or compensating controls to mitigate potential risks until the patch is applied.

title: In multi-tenanted deployments, the application consent management mechanism fails to correctly...
description:
In multi-tenanted deployments, the application consent management mechanism fails to correctly isolate consent scopes between tenants. Consent granted by a user for a specific SaaS application within one tenant can be incorrectly applied to SaaS applications with the same name in other tenants, leading to unintended cross-tenant consent sharing.

This vulnerability may result in the exposure of user data across tenants, enabling SaaS applications in different tenants to access and modify informa

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2025-13475.

description: In Trail of Bits fickling versions up to and including 0.1.11, the UnsafeImportsML analysis pass unconditionally calls AnalysisContext.shorten_code(node) on every import node it inspects, regardless of whether the import is flagged as unsafe. This call registers the shortened code representation in the shared AnalysisContext.reported_shortened_code set. When the MLAllowlist analysis pass subsequently runs, it calls the same shorten_code() method, receives already_reported=True for every import,

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-14535.

title: Trail of Bits fickling versions up to and including 0.1.10 do not include the Python standard...
description: Trail of Bits fickling versions up to and including 0.1.10 do not include the Python standard library modules _posixsubprocess, site, and atexit in the UNSAFE_IMPORTS denylist (fickle.py). Because these modules are absent from the denylist, fickling's check_safety() function returns LIKELY_SAFE with zero findings for pickle payloads that invoke dangerous functions including _posixsubprocess.fork_exec (C-level process spawner capable of executing arbitrary binaries), site.execsitecustomize (execu

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-14534.

title: A vulnerability was determined in omec-project amf up to 2.1.1. This issue affects the function...
description: A vulnerability was determined in omec-project amf up to 2.1.1. This issue affects the function RRCInactiveTransitionReport of the component NGAP Message Handler. Executing a manipulation can lead to denial of service. The attack may be performed from remote. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized. This patch is called 34bc6724acc97dba1f8691e586da95b042cb612d. A patch should be applied to remediate this issue.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the omec-project AMF up to version 2.1.1 could allow an attacker to execute a denial-of-service (DoS) attack remotely by exploiting the NGAP Message Handler's RRCInactiveTransitionReport function. This could disrupt network operations and impact service availability.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply the patch identified by commit 34bc6724acc97dba1f8691e586da95b042cb612d to mitigate the vulnerability.
Conduct a thorough review of systems running omec-project AMF to ensure no unauthorized changes or exploit attempts have occurred.
Implement additional monitoring and logging for NGAP Message Handler activities to detect potential exploitation attempts.

title:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

ipv6: account for fraggap on...
description:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

ipv6: account for fraggap on the paged allocation path

In __ip6_append_data(), when the paged-allocation branch is taken
(MSG_MORE / NETIF_F_SG / large fraglen), alloclen and pagedlen are
computed as

	alloclen = fragheaderlen + transhdrlen;
	pagedlen = datalen - transhdrlen;

datalen already includes fraggap (datalen = length + fraggap). When
fraggap is non-zero, this is not the first skb and transhdrlen is zero.
The fraggap

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-53362.

title:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

KVM: x86: Fix shadow paging...
description:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

KVM: x86: Fix shadow paging use-after-free due to unexpected role

Commit 0cb2af2ea66ad ("KVM: x86: Fix shadow paging use-after-free due
to unexpected GFN") fixed a shadow paging mismatch between stored and
computed GFNs; the bug could be triggered by changing a PDE mapping from
outside the guest, and then deleting a memslot.  The rmap_remove()
call would miss entries created after the PDE change because the GFN
of the leaf SPT

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the Linux kernel's KVM module could allow attackers to exploit a use-after-free condition in shadow paging, potentially leading to guest VM compromise, data leakage, or denial of service. This poses a significant risk to environments relying on virtualization for critical workloads.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply the patch provided in commit 0cb2af2ea66ad to all affected Linux systems running KVM.
Conduct a thorough review of virtualized environments to identify and mitigate any potential exploitation of this vulnerability.
Monitor systems for unusual activity or signs of exploitation, such as unexpected changes in guest VM behavior or resource usage.

title: CVE-2026-11773 - The Masteriyo LMS – LMS Course Builder, Quizzes & Certificates plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to
description: The Masteriyo LMS – LMS Course Builder, Quizzes & Certificates plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to, and including, 2.2.1. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to perform an action. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with student-level access and above, to modify the description (post content) of arbitrary course announcements authored by instructors or administrators.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11773.

title: CVE-2026-11597 - The Surbma | Infusionsoft Shortcode plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scriptin
description: The Surbma | Infusionsoft Shortcode plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'infusionsoft-form' shortcode in versions up to, and including, 2.0.1. This is due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping on user-supplied 'account' and 'id' shortcode attributes in the surbma_infusionsoft_shortcode_shortcode() function, which are concatenated directly into a <script> tag's src attribute. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with contributor-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows authenticated attackers with contributor-level access to inject malicious JavaScript into the website, which can lead to data theft, session hijacking, or unauthorized actions performed on behalf of other users. This could compromise the integrity and trustworthiness of the affected website.
recommended_actions: Update the Surbma | Infusionsoft Shortcode plugin to a patched version as soon as it becomes available.
Restrict contributor-level access to trusted users only and regularly review user roles and permissions.
Implement a web application firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious payloads targeting this vulnerability.

title: CVE-2026-11364 - The Product Specifications for WooCommerce plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized modifi
description: The Product Specifications for WooCommerce plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized modification, creation, and deletion of data in versions up to and including 0.8.9. This is due to a missing capability check and missing nonce verification in the __invoke() methods of the AttributeGroupController and AttributeController classes, which are bound to the 'dwps_modify_groups' and 'dwps_modify_attributes' AJAX actions. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Subscriber-level access and above, to create, edit, and delete arbitrary product specification groups and attributes (taxonomy terms in the 'spec-group' and attribute taxonomies), corrupting business data and impacting the site's frontend display.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11364.

title: CVE-2026-9677 - The Shariff for WordPress Shariff for WordPress plugin through 1.0.11 does not sanitize or escape th
description: The Shariff for WordPress Shariff for WordPress plugin through 1.0.11 does not sanitize or escape the shariff_infourl setting before outputting it in the frontend HTML via the generateshariff() function, which could allow high privilege users such as admin to perform Stored Cross-Site Scripting attacks even when the unfiltered_html capability is disallowed (for example in multisite setup).

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-9677.

title: CVE-2026-13245 - The MaxButtons – Create buttons plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Reflected Cross-Site Scripting
description: The MaxButtons – Create buttons plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Reflected Cross-Site Scripting via the 'view' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 9.8.5 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that execute if they can successfully trick a user into performing an action such as clicking on a link.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-13245.

title: CVE-2026-12404 - The NEX-Forms – Ultimate Forms Plugin for WordPress plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorizat
description: The NEX-Forms – Ultimate Forms Plugin for WordPress plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to, and including, 9.2.2. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to perform an action. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to enumerate sequential report IDs and download complete form submission data — including names, email addresses, phone numbers, postal addresses, payment details, and uploaded file paths — for any saved report on the site.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-12404.

title: CVE-2026-10820 - The Paid Membership Plugin, Ecommerce, User Registration Form, Login Form, User Profile & Restrict C
description: The Paid Membership Plugin, Ecommerce, User Registration Form, Login Form, User Profile & Restrict Content  WordPress plugin before 4.16.17 does not verify that the user performing a subscription action owns the targeted subscription, allowing any authenticated user (Subscriber+) to cancel other users' active subscriptions via an Insecure Direct Object Reference.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-10820.

title: CVE-2026-12415 - The Invoice Generator plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to privilege escalation due to a missing ca
description: The Invoice Generator plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to privilege escalation due to a missing capability check on the pravel_invoice_edit_account() AJAX action in versions up to, and including, 1.0.0. The handler is exposed via wp_ajax_nopriv_pravel_invoice_edit_account, accepts an attacker-controlled user_id and user_email from POST data, and calls wp_update_user() without verifying authentication, ownership, or a nonce. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to change the email address of any user, including administrators, and then trigger WordPress's password reset flow to gain access to the targeted account.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-12415.

title: CVE-2026-13422 - The HD Quiz plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Cross-Site Request Forgery in versions 2.2.0 to 2.
description: The HD Quiz plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Cross-Site Request Forgery in versions 2.2.0 to 2.2.1. This is due to missing or incorrect nonce validation on the hdq_validate_nonce function. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to delete or modify quizzes and questions, create new quizzes, and change plugin settings via a forged request granted they can trick a site administrator into performing an action such as clicking on a link.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-13422.

title: CVE-2026-13335 - The CodePeople Post Map for Google Maps plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scri
description: The CodePeople Post Map for Google Maps plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via 'cpm_point' Post Meta in all versions up to, and including, 1.2.6 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Contributor-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-13335.

title: CVE-2026-13333 - The Groundhogg — CRM, Newsletters, and Marketing Automation plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to ge
description: The Groundhogg — CRM, Newsletters, and Marketing Automation plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generic SQL Injection via 'query[select]' Parameter in all versions up to, and including, 4.5.5 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Sales Representative-level access and above, to append additional SQL queries into already existing queries that can be used to extract sensitive information from the database. The sanitized Contact_Query code path can be bypassed by supplying an invalid filter type (e.g., query[filters][0][0][type]=invalid_filter_nonexistent), causing a FilterException to be caught and execution to fall through to the unsanitized Legacy_Contact_Query path.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-13333.

title: CVE-2026-13331 - The Groundhogg — CRM, Newsletters, and Marketing Automation plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to ge
description: The Groundhogg — CRM, Newsletters, and Marketing Automation plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generic SQL Injection via the 'search' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 4.5.5 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with marketer-level access and above, to append additional SQL queries into already existing queries that can be used to extract sensitive information from the database.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-13331.

title: CVE-2026-11356 - The Ivory Search – WordPress Search Plugin plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site S
description: The Ivory Search – WordPress Search Plugin plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via 'menu_title' and 'menu_magnifier_color' Settings in all versions up to, and including, 5.5.15 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with administrator-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11356.

title: CVE-2025-59868 - HCL Traveler for Microsoft Outlook (HTMO) is susceptible to a sensitive data exposure vulnerability
description: HCL Traveler for Microsoft Outlook (HTMO) is susceptible to a sensitive data exposure vulnerability which could allow an attacker to exploit application information to then attempt additional attacks and cause unknown behavior in the application.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2025-59868.

title: CVE-2023-37524 - HCL Traveler for Microsoft Outlook (HTMO) is susceptible to vulnerabilities due to .NET Framework 4.
description: HCL Traveler for Microsoft Outlook (HTMO) is susceptible to vulnerabilities due to .NET Framework 4.5 being out of service.  Since .NET Framework 4.5 has reached end-of-life and no longer receives security updates, it may expose the application to publicly known security weaknesses through vulnerable third-party components.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2023-37524.
